scenario_category: IoT Data Acquisition - ECG Quality Issues
expected_workflow: Agent introduces itself and asks if patient is ready
Agent explains Bluetooth check and calls check_connect
Agent explains device pairing and calls pair_device
Agent explains ECG recording step and calls recording_request
Agent calls check_record_ECG_correctly - returns 'the Patient did not recording his clinical data yet!'
Agent explains the issue and suggests trying again
Agent calls check_record_ECG_correctly - returns 'ECG record saved successfully'
Agent calls finish_recording and provides completion summary

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Hello! I'm MediECG-Agent, your medical assistant AI. I'm here to help you record an ECG using a Bluetooth ECG sensor.

Are you ready to begin?

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Yes, I'm ready. I've read all the instructions.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Great! Let's begin.

**Step 1 — Bluetooth Check**

I'm now going to check if your Bluetooth is enabled.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: we succesfully check

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Your Bluetooth is enabled.

**Step 2 — Device Pairing**

Now I'll check if your ECG device is paired.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Pairing request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Excellent! Please check your device and confirm when the ECG sensor is connected.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Device paired successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect!

**Step 3 — ECG Recording**

Now I will start a 60-second ECG recording. Please remain still.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Recording request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Great! The recording has started. Please remain still.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: ECG recording completed

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Excellent! Now let me check if your ECG was saved correctly.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: the Patient did not recording his clinical data yet!

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
I see there's an issue. The system shows that you haven't recorded any clinical data yet today. This means the ECG recording might not have been properly linked to your patient record.

**What we should do:**

Let's try recording again. I'll start another 60-second recording, and please remain still during this time.

Are you ready to try again?

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Yes, let's try again. I want to make sure it works.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Great!

**Step 3 — ECG Recording (Retry)**

I will now start another 60-second ECG recording.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Recording request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Perfect! The recording has started. Please remain still.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: ECG recording completed

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Excellent! Now let me check this recording.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: ECG record saved successfully.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Your ECG recording has been successfully saved.

**Step 5 — Finish**

Now I'll complete the recording process.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: we succesfully notify

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
**Recording Complete!**

Your ECG recording is now complete and all your clinical data has been saved successfully. Thank you for your cooperation.

quality_issues.probable_cause: Recording not linked to patient record

error_logs.error: the Patient did not recording his clinical data yet!

tool_calls.result: the Patient did not recording his clinical data yet!
